violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed chocolate chip cookie dough box open in the walk in freezer. Also observed the sugar container left open.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Observed reach in cooler and freezer that needs to be cleaned more frequently.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed spillage in that cabinet under the tea dispensers. Observed pooling water under that fountain machine at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed floor in walk in cooler very slippery. Observed wall by ice cream machine very dirty with grease. Observed dirty floor by back door.
